caption: A person with blonde hair wearing a dark t-shirt and a headset is visible in a small picture-in-picture window, appearing to react while gaming. The main screen displays a "LINEUP" menu from a sports video game, featuring "SPECIAL TEAMS" highlighted in blue. The interface shows player cards, including one for "AVERSON" wearing number 18, and several cards with pink backgrounds. On-screen text at the top includes numbers like "173,037", "14,600", "2,343,543", and "LVL 19". At the bottom, menu options read "BEST LINEUP", "HELP", and "BACK". As the sequence progresses, the person's facial expression shifts from a neutral look to an open-mouthed expression of surprise or excitement. The game menu remains static across the frames, while the person's movements and expressions in the corner window are the only changing elements in the scene.
